//: Bundle-size budget (CI-6 in TODOS.md). Chunks matched by glob pattern against dist/assets/. Each entry's `maxKB` is the hard cap — exceed it and CI fails with a per-chunk diff. The `comment` field is for humans + grep, not enforced.

chunks.comment: recharts. Heavy chart library; keep watching. If this exceeds budget, evaluate lighter alternatives (chart.js, victory) or per-page lazy-load.
React + ReactDOM. Should NOT grow much; if it does, an unrelated dep is bundling React internals.
reactflow (only the workflow + sequence builder need it; consider per-route lazy-load if size matters)
lucide-react icon barrel. Tree-shakable — bloat means someone imported the whole barrel instead of named icons.

PR #1233 added xlsx (^0.18.5) for CSV/Excel import on Contacts/Leads/Travel pages. Tree-shaken chunk is ~419 KB; budget set with small headroom. Long-term: evaluate lighter alternatives (exceljs, papaparse for CSV-only) or lazy-load importers.
Main SPA entry chunk. Critical-path; keep tight.
Dashboards page is the heaviest single feature page. Already 71 KB.
PR #1199 landing page builder + block renderer + travel block editor. Currently ~243 KB; lazy-loaded on the builder route only.

totals.comment: Whole frontend/dist/assets/ JS + CSS. Catches the case where a new chunk pops in without being budgeted explicitly. Bumped 5700→6200 on 2026-07-21: PR #1233 added xlsx for CSV/Excel import; the xlsx chunk is ~419 KB and pushes total JS to ~5853 KB. Bumping by 500 KB restores ~140 KB headroom.
